questions.question: 於進場及落地階段時,襟翼的主要功能之一是:
questions.A: 降低下降角度而不增加其空速
questions.B: 可以較低的空速提供相同的升力
questions.C: 減少升力, 可以採取比正常下降角度為陡的方式進場
questions.question_en: One of the main functions of flaps during the approach and landing is to
questions.A_en: decraese the angle of descent without increasing the airspeed
questions.B_en: provide the same amount of lift at a slower airsped
questions.C_en: decrease lift, thus enabling a steeper-than-normal approach to be made

questions.question: 於平飛轉彎時使用襟翼, 何者為真 ?
questions.A: 伸放襟翼, 會增加失速速度
questions.B: 收襟翼, 會增加失速速度
questions.C: 收襟翼, 需增加向前 的駕駛桿力量
questions.question_en: Which is true regarding the use of flaps during level turns ?
questions.A_en: The lowering of flaps incraeses the stall speed
questions.B_en: The rasing of flaps increases the stall speed
questions.C_en: Rasing flaps will require added forward pressure on the yoke or stick

questions.question: 相較於其它翼形, 平直翼的失速傾向發生在何處 ?
questions.A: 失速由翼尖向翼根延伸
questions.B: 失速由翼根向翼尖延伸
questions.C: 失速由翼後緣中間部位向翼 根及翼尖延伸
questions.question_en: A rectangular wing, as compared to other wing planforms, has a tendency to stall at the
questions.A_en: wingtip, with the stall progression toward the wing root
questions.B_en: wing root, with the stall progression toward the wingtip
questions.C_en: center trailing edge, with the stall progression outward toward the wing root and tip

questions.question: 機翼攻角直接控制著
questions.A: 機翼傾角
questions.B: 機翼上/下方氣流流量
questions.C: 作用於機翼的壓力分佈
questions.question_en: The angle of attack of a wing directly controls the
questions.A_en: angle of incidence of the wing
questions.B_en: amount of airflow above and below the wing
questions.C_en: distribution of pressure acting on the wing

questions.question: 機翼上翼面結霜, 經常會導致
questions.A: 高於正常攻角而失速
questions.B: 低於正常攻角而失速
questions.C: 因阻力係數較大, 而無法獲得足 夠的起飛速度
questions.question_en: Frost covering the upper surface of an airplane wing usually will cause
questions.A_en: the airplane to stall at an angle of attack that is higher than normal
questions.B_en: the airplane to stall at an angle of attack that is lower than normal
questions.C_en: drag factors so large that sufficient speed can not be obtained for takeoff

questions.question: 機翼的失速攻角保持恆定, 與何者無關 ?
questions.A: 重量, 動壓, 坡度或俯仰姿態
questions.B: 動壓, 但隨著重量, 坡度及俯仰姿態而改變
questions.C: 重量及俯仰姿態, 但隨著動壓及坡度而改變
questions.question_en: The angle of attak at which a wing stalls remains constant regardless of
questions.A_en: weight, dynamic pressure, bank angle, or pitch attitude
questions.B_en: dynamic pressure, but varies with weight, bank angle, and pitch attitude
questions.C_en: weight and pitch attitude, but varies with dynamic pressure and bank angle

questions.question: 飛機減速至VA以下, 是基於下列那項天氣現象所需 ?
questions.A: 使失速速度增加的高密度高度
questions.B: 使失速速度增加的亂流
questions.C: 使失速速度減低的亂 流
questions.question_en: The need to slow an aircraft below VA is brought about by the following weather phenomenon
questions.A_en: high density altitude which increases the indicated stall speed
questions.B_en: turbulence which causes an increase in stall speed
questions.C_en: turbulence which causes an decrease in stall speed

questions.question: 失速速度受那些因素影響 ?
questions.A: 重量, 負荷因數及動力
questions.B: 負荷因數, 攻角及動力
questions.C: 攻角, 重量及空氣密度
questions.question_en: Stall speed is affected by
questions.A_en: weight, load factor, and power
questions.B_en: load factor, angle of attack, and power
questions.C_en: angle of attack, weight, and air density

questions.question: 飛機失速速度主要是受什麼影響 ?
questions.A: 空氣密度變化
questions.B: 飛行姿態變化
questions.C: 飛機負荷變化
questions.question_en: The staling speed of an airplane is most affected by
questions.A_en: changes in air density
questions.B_en: variations in flight attitude
questions.C_en: variations in airplane loading

questions.question: 飛機失速是在相同的
questions.A: 攻角, 與相對於地平線的姿態無關
questions.B: 空速, 與相對於地平線的姿態無關
questions.C: 攻角 及相對於地平線的姿態
questions.question_en: An airplane will stall at the same
questions.A_en: angle of attack regardless of the attitude with relation to the horizon
questions.B_en: airspeed regardless of the attitude with relation to the horizon
questions.C_en: angle of attack and attitude with relation to the horizon

questions.question: 俯衝時迅速改正, 負荷因數效應會造成失速速度 ?
questions.A: 提高
questions.B: 降低
questions.C: 不變
questions.question_en: In a rapid recovery from a dive, the effects of load factor would cause the stall speed to
questions.A_en: increase
questions.B_en: decrease
questions.C_en: not vary

questions.question: 飛機於何種情形下作失速改正會較為困難 ?
questions.A: 重心後移
questions.B: 重心前移
questions.C: 升降舵配平向下調整
questions.question_en: Recovery from a stall in any airplane becomes more difficult when its
questions.A_en: C.G. moves aft
questions.B_en: C.G. moves forward
questions.C_en: elevator trim is adjusted noseddown

questions.question: 關於攻角變化, 何者為真 ?
questions.A: 降低攻角, 會增加下翼面壓力及減少阻力
questions.B: 增加攻角會增加阻力
questions.C: 增加攻角, 會減少下翼面壓力及增加阻力
questions.question_en: Which statement is true relative to changing angle of attack
questions.A_en: a decraese in angle of attack will increase pressure below the wing, and decrease drag
questions.B_en: an increase in angle of attack will increase drag
questions.C_en: an increase in angle of attack will decrease pressure below the wing, and increase drag

questions.question: 當高度增加時, 為產生相同升力, 飛機必須飛行在
questions.A: 相同真空速, 而與攻角無關
questions.B: 較低的真空速及較大的攻角
questions.C: 任何已知的攻角下 較高的真空速
questions.question_en: To generate the same amount of lift as altitude is increased, an airplane must be flown at
questions.A_en: the same true airspeed regardless of angle of attack
questions.B_en: a lower true airspeed and a greater angle of attack
questions.C_en: a higher true airspeed for any given angle of attack

questions.question: 當坡度增加時, 升力的垂直分量
questions.A: 減少, 而且升力的水平分量增加
questions.B: 增加, 而且升力的水平分量減少
questions.C: 減少, 而 且升力的水平分量保持定值
questions.question_en: As the angle of bank is increased, the vertical component of lift
questions.A_en: decreases and the horizontal component of lift increases
questions.B_en: increases and the horizontal component of lift decreases
questions.C_en: decreases and the horizontal component of lift remains constant

questions.question: 於穩定狀態下降中的飛機, 下列有關的作用力何者為真 ?
questions.A: 上升力的總合小於下降力的總合
questions.B: 向後力的總合大於向前力的總合
questions.C: 向前力的 總合等於向後力的總合
questions.question_en: Which is true regarding the forces acting on an aircraft in a steady-state descent ? The sum of all
questions.A_en: upward forces is less than the sum of all downward forces
questions.B_en: rearword forces is greater than the sum of all forward forces
questions.C_en: forward forces is equal to the sum of all rearward forces

questions.question: 由平直飛行轉換至爬升過程中, 攻角增加而升力
questions.A: 暫時減少
questions.B: 維持不變
questions.C: 暫時增加
questions.question_en: During the transition from straight-and-level flight to a climb, the angle of attack is increased and lift
questions.A_en: is momentarily decreased
questions.B_en: remains the same
questions.C_en: is momentarily increased

questions.question: 當飛機減速時, 為了保持高度則縱向控制應如何改變 ?
questions.A: 增加攻角以產生比阻力更大的升力
questions.B: 增加攻角以補償減少的升力
questions.C: 降低攻角以 補償增加的升力
questions.question_en: What changes in airplane longitudinal control must be made to maintain altitude while the airspeed is being decreased ?
questions.A_en: increase the angle of attack to produce more lift than drag
questions.B_en: increase the angle of attack to compensate for the decreasing lift
questions.C_en: decrease the angle of attack to compenstae for the increasing drag

questions.question: 於穩定定速飛行時, 下列有關升力何者為真 ?
questions.A: 低速時攻角減小, 以產生足夠的升力來保持高度
questions.B: 對每個攻角而言, 皆有一對應 的指示空速, 以產生足夠的升力來保持高度
questions.C: 一翼切形會在相同的指示空速下失速; 因此, 當重量增加時需加速, 以產生足夠的升力來保持高度
questions.question_en: Which is true regarding the force of lift in steady, unaccelerated flight ?
questions.A_en: at lower airspeeds the angle of attack must be less to generate sufficient lift to maintain altitude
questions.B_en: there is a corresponding indicated airspeed required to every angle of attack to generate sufficient lift to maintain altitude
questions.C_en: an airfoil will always stall at the same indicated airspeed; therefore, an increase in weight will require an increase in speed to generate sufficient lift to maintain altitude

questions.question: 理論上, 飛機平飛時如加速至 2倍的速度, 則寄生阻力會變成
questions.A: 2倍
questions.C: 4倍

questions.A_en: twice as great
questions.B_en: half as great
questions.C_en: four times greater

questions.A: 與低速時相同
questions.B: 較低速時大2倍
questions.C: 較低速時大4倍
questions.question_en: In theory, if the angle of attack and other factors remain constant and the airspeed is doubled, the lift produced at the higher speed will be
questions.A_en: the same as at the lower speed
questions.B_en: two times greater than at the lower speed
questions.C_en: four times greater than at the lower speed

questions.question: 當飛機脫離地面效應時會
questions.A: 使地面摩擦減少, 而需要稍微減推力
questions.B: 使誘導阻力增加, 而需要更大的推力

questions.A_en: experience a reduction in ground friction and require a slight power reduction
questions.B_en: experience an increase in induced drag and require more thrust
questions.C_en: require a lower angle of attack to maintain the same lift coefficient

questions.B: 相同的攻角
questions.C: 較大的攻角
questions.question_en: To produce the same lift while in ground effect as when out of ground effect, the airplane requires
questions.A_en: a lower angle of attack
questions.B_en: the same angle of attack
questions.C_en: a greater angle of attack

questions.question: 縱向安定性所包含的飛機運動, 受制於

questions.B: 升降舵
questions.C: 副翼
questions.question_en: longitudinal stability involves the motion of the airplane controlled by its
questions.A_en: rudder
questions.B_en: elevator
questions.C_en: ailerons

questions.B: 橫軸
questions.C: 縱軸

questions.A_en: vertical axis
questions.B_en: lateral axis
questions.C_en: longitudinal axis

questions.A: 及坡度必須減小

questions.C: 必須減小或坡度增加

questions.A_en: and angle of bank must be decreased
questions.B_en: must be increased or angle of bank decreased
questions.C_en: must be decreased or angle of bank increased

questions.question: 於平飛轉彎保持固定坡度, 如轉彎率改變則負荷因數

questions.A_en: maintain the bank and decrease airspeed
questions.B_en: increase the bank and increase airspeed

questions.A_en: for a specific angle of bank and airspeed, the rate and radius of turn will not vary

questions.C_en: the faster the true airspeed, the faster the rate and larger the radius of turn regardless of the angle of bank

questions.A: 轉彎率減小, 導致負荷因數減小

questions.question: 飛機於穩定氣流中作平飛協調轉彎, 其翼負荷決定於

questions.C: 真空速
questions.question_en: Airplane wing loading during a level coordinated turn in smooth air depending upon the
questions.A_en: rate of turn

questions.C_en: true airspeed

questions.A: 安裝及儀器誤差
questions.B: 無動力(慢車)失速速度
questions.C: 操控速度
questions.question_en: Calibrated airspeed is best described as indicated aiespeed corrected for
questions.A_en: installation and instrument error
questions.B_en: the power-off stall speed
questions.C_en: the maneuvering speed

questions.question: 如飛機陀螺儀已具備真空系統裝置, 則電針球儀的優點是 ?
questions.A: 作為真空系統失效時的備用裝置

questions.question: 為避開剛落地的大型噴射機可能之機尾擾流, 起飛前應計劃於跑道何處離地 ?

questions.question: 關於機尾擾流, 何者敘述正確 ?
questions.A: 渦流產生開始於起飛滾行初期
questions.B: 主要危險是因為誘導滾轉而引起的失控

questions.B_en: the primary hazard is loss of control because of induced roll

questions.C_en: make sure you are slightly below the path of the jet and perpendicular to the course

questions.B_en: stay below and to one side of its final approach flightpath
questions.C_en: stay well below its final approach flightpath and land at least 2,000 ft behind

questions.question_en: if severe turbulence is encountered during flight, the pilot should reduce the airspeed to
questions.A_en: minimum control speed
questions.B_en: design-maneuvering speed (VA)
questions.C_en: max structural cruising speed (VNO)

questions.question: 飛行於強烈亂流中時, 使翼負荷因數減至最小的最佳操作技術為 ?
questions.A: 視需要調整油門位置, 以保持定速
questions.B: 使用油門控制速度, 保持機翼水平, 容許高 度變化
questions.C: 使用油門及配平控制速度等於或低於操作速度 (VA), 保持機翼水平, 並容 許空速及高度變化
questions.question_en: Which is the best technique for minimizing the wing-load factor when flying in severe turbulence ?
questions.A_en: change power settings, as necessary, to maintain constant airspeed
questions.B_en: control airspeed with power, maintain wings level, and accept variations of altitude
questions.C_en: set power and trim to obtain an airspeed at or below maneuvering speed, maintain wings level, and accept variations of airspeed and altitude

questions.question: 駕駛員遇及強烈的晴空亂流播報區域, 在遭遇到第一波亂流時, 所採取的適當反應是
questions.A: 保持高度及空速
questions.B: 調整空速至建議的穿越亂流速度
questions.C: 使用操作速度, 以淺平爬 升或下降的方式進入亂流區
questions.question_en: A pilot is encountering an area where significant clear air turbulence has been reported. Which action is appropriate upon encountering the first ripple
questions.A_en: maintain altitude and airspeed
questions.B_en: adjust airspeed to that recommended for rough air
questions.C_en: enter a shallow climb or descent at maneuvering speed

questions.question: 於特定外形下, 其失速速度或最低穩定飛行速度的正確符號是
questions.A: VS
questions.B: VS1
questions.C: VS0
questions.question_en: Which is the correct symbol for the stalling speed or the minimum steady flight speed in a specified configuration ?
questions.A_en: VS
questions.B_en: VS1
questions.C_en: VS0

questions.question: 以小飛機而言, 正常螺旋改正會變得較困難, 如果
questions.A: 重心過度後移, 並繞著縱軸旋轉
questions.B: 重心過度後移, 並繞著重心旋轉
questions.C: 進入螺旋 是在完全失速之前
questions.question_en: In small aircraft, normal recovery from spins may become difficult if the
questions.A_en: C.G. is too far rearward, and rotation is around the longitudinal axis
questions.B_en: C.G. is too far rearward, and rotation is around the C.G.
questions.C_en: spin is entered before the stall is fully developed

questions.question: 對螺旋槳飛機而言, 最大升/阻比之飛行性能為 ?
questions.A: 在已知距離內, 獲得最大高度
questions.B: 最大航程及最大下滑距離
questions.C: 最大升力係數及最 大阻力係數
questions.question_en: What performance is a characteristic of flight at max lift/drag ratio in a propeller-driven airplane ? Maximum
questions.A_en: gain altitude over a given distance
questions.B_en: range and max glide distance
questions.C_en: coefficient of lift and max coefficient of drag

questions.question: 航機飛行中，機翼上之氣動力與飛機重量之比值，下列敘述者為真?
questions.A: 此比值稱為負荷因數，直接影響失速速度
questions.B: 此比值稱為展弦比，直接影響失速速 度
questions.C: 此比值稱為負荷因數，與失速速度無關
questions.question_en: The ratio between the total airload imposed on the wing and the gross weight of an aircraft in flight is known as
questions.A_en: load factor and directly affects stall speed.
questions.B_en: aspect load and directly affects stall speed.
questions.C_en: load factor and has no relation with stall speed.

questions.question: 有關負荷因數之定義，下列敘述何者為真?
questions.A: 負荷因數為機翼所產生的昇力除以飛機總重量
questions.B: 負荷因數為機翼所產生的昇力乘 以飛機總重量
questions.C: 負荷因數為機翼所產生的昇力除以飛機基本空重
questions.question_en: Load factor is the lift generated by the wings of an aircraft at any given time
questions.A_en: divided by the total weight of the aircraft.
questions.B_en: multiplied by the total weight of the aircraft.
questions.C_en: divided by the basic empty weight of the aircraft.

questions.question: 飛機在一已知坡度下作等高度協調轉彎, 所承受之負荷因數
questions.A: 為恆定，但失速速度較未轉彎時為高
questions.B: 隨轉彎率而改變
questions.C: 為恆定，但失速速度 較未轉彎時為低
questions.question_en: For a given angle of bank, in any airplane, the load factor imposed in a coordinated constant-altitude turn
questions.A_en: is constant and the stall speed increases.
questions.B_en: varies with the rate of turn.
questions.C_en: is constant and the stall speed decreases.

questions.question: 飛機於穩定氣流中作平飛協調轉彎, 其翼負荷決定於
questions.A: 轉彎率
questions.B: 坡度
questions.C: 真空速
questions.question_en: Airplane wing loading during a level coordinated turn in smooth air depends upon the
questions.A_en: rate of turn.
questions.B_en: angle of bank.
questions.C_en: true airspeed.

questions.question: 飛機俯衝時所作之迅速改正, 其負荷因數效應會使失速速度
questions.A: 提高
questions.B: 降低
questions.C: 不變
questions.question_en: In a rapid recovery from a dive, the effects of load factor would cause the stall speed to
questions.A_en: increase.
questions.B_en: decrease.
questions.C_en: not vary.

questions.question: 飛機總重2000磅,於 60°坡度同高度轉彎總負載為
questions.question_en: If an aircraft with a gross weight of 2,000 pounds was subjected to a 60° constant-altitude bank, the total load would be
questions.A_en: 3,000 pounds.
questions.B_en: 4,000 pounds.
questions.C_en: 12,000 pounds.

questions.question: 協調轉彎時, 保持固定坡度及高度, 當空速增加, 則
questions.A: 轉彎率減小, 導致負荷因數減小
questions.B: 轉彎率減小, 負荷因數不變
questions.C: 轉彎率增加, 負荷因數不變
questions.question_en: While maintaining a constant angle of bank and altitude in a coordinated turn, an increase in airspeed will
questions.A_en: decrease the rate of turn resulting in a decreased load factor.
questions.B_en: decrease the rate of turn resulting in no change in load factor.
questions.C_en: increase the rate of turn resulting in no change in load factor.

questions.question: 有關機翼上之升力，最合適的定義為
questions.A: 與相對風垂直之作用力
questions.B: 與翼弦垂直之壓力分量
questions.C: 機翼上半部表面層流對機翼 所產生的壓力，其與翼弦垂直之壓力分量
questions.question_en: Lift on a wing is most properly defined as the
questions.A_en: force acting perpendicular to the relative wind.
questions.B_en: differential pressure acting perpendicular to the chord of the wing.
questions.C_en: reduced pressure resulting from a laminar flow over the upper camber of an airfoil, which acts perpendicular to the mean camber.

questions.question: 於平飛轉彎保持固定坡度, 如轉彎率改變則負荷因數
questions.A: 保持恆定, 與空氣密度及合力的升力向量無關
questions.B: 會隨著速度及空氣密度而改變
questions.C: 隨著合力的升力向量而改變
questions.question_en: While holding the angle of bank constant, if the rate of turn is varied the load factor would
questions.A_en: remain constant regardless of air density and the resultant lift vector.
questions.B_en: vary depending upon speed and air density.
questions.C_en: vary depending upon the resultant lift vector.

questions.question: 理論上, 飛機平飛時如加速至 2倍的速度, 則寄生阻力會變成
questions.A: 2倍
questions.C: 4倍
questions.question_en: In theory, if the airspeed of an airplane is doubled while in level flight, parasite drag will become
questions.A_en: twice as great
questions.B_en: half as great
questions.C_en: four times greater

questions.question: 平飛時, 當空速低於最大升/阻比的速度, 飛機總阻力會
questions.A: 減少, 因為寄生阻力較小
questions.B: 增加, 因為誘導阻力增加
questions.C: 增加, 因為寄生阻力增 加
questions.question_en: As airspeed decreases in level flight below that speed for max lift/drag ratio, total drag of an airplane
questions.A_en: decreases because of lower parasite drag
questions.B_en: increases because of increased induced drag
questions.C_en: increases because of increased parasite drag

questions.question: 飛機以60度坡度轉彎，空速從90哩加速至135哩負荷因數會
questions.A: 負荷因數增加,失速速度增加
questions.B: 負荷因數減少,失速速度增加
questions.C: 負荷因數一樣但 轉彎半徑增加
questions.question_en: If the airspeed is increased from 90 knots to 135 knots during a level 60°banked turn, the load factor will
questions.A_en: increase as well as the stall speed.
questions.B_en: decrease and the stall speed will increase.
questions.C_en: remain the same but the radius of turn will increase.

questions.question: (參考Fig1)有關空氣力學阻力，下列何者為真
questions.A: 誘導阻力是完全由空氣阻力而產生的
questions.B: 所有的空氣力學阻力完全是由昇力所產生 的
questions.C: 誘導阻力是伴隨昇力而產生且受空速影響很大
questions.question_en: (Refer to Figure 1.)Which is true regarding aerodynamic drag?
questions.A_en: Induced drag is created entirely by air resistance.
questions.B_en: All aerodynamic drag is created entirely by the production of lift.
questions.C_en: Induced drag is a by-product of lift and is greatly affected by changes in airspeed.

questions.question: (參考Fig1) 一穩定飛行的飛機如果保持在A點空速, 則此飛機將,
questions.A: 有最大的昇阻比
questions.B: 有最小的昇阻比
questions.C: 有最大的昇力係數
questions.question_en: (Refer to Figure 1.) At the airspeed represented by point A, in steady flight, the airplane will
questions.A_en: have its maximum L/D ratio.
questions.B_en: have its minimum L/D ratio.
questions.C_en: be developing its maximum coefficient of lift.

questions.question: (參考Fig1) 一穩定飛行的飛機如果保持在B點空速, 則飛行員可以預期得到飛機最大之
questions.A: 滯空時間
questions.B: 滑降距離
questions.C: 昇力係數
questions.question_en: (Refer to Figure 1.) At the airspeed represented by point B, in steady flight, the pilot can expect to obtain the airplane’s maximum
questions.A_en: endurance.
questions.B_en: glide range.
questions.C_en: coefficient of lift.

questions.question: (參考Fig1)機翼上的減速板的主要功用是為減少
questions.A: 阻力
questions.B: 落地速度
questions.C: 機翼上的昇力
questions.question_en: (Refer to Figure 1.)The primary purpose of wing spoilers is to decrease
questions.A_en: the drag.
questions.B_en: landing speed.
questions.C_en: the lift of the wing.

questions.question: 關於攻角變化, 何者為真 ?
questions.A: 降低攻角, 會增加下翼面壓力及減少阻力
questions.B: 增加攻角會增加阻力
questions.C: 增加攻角, 會減少下翼面壓力及增加阻力
questions.question_en: Which statement is true relative to changing angle of attack?
questions.A_en: A decrease in angle of attack will increase pressure below the wing, and decrease drag.
questions.B_en: An increase in angle of attack will increase drag.
questions.C_en: An increase in angle of attack will decrease pressure below the wing, and increase drag.

questions.question: (參考Fig2) 關於失速速度之敘述，下列何者為真
questions.A: 無動力的狀下，襟翼及起落架放下時會有較高之失速速度
questions.B: 飛機在60°坡度轉彎 時，起落架收起會有較低之失速速度
questions.C: 有動力的狀下，低轉彎坡度會有較低之失速速 度
questions.question_en: (Refer to Figure 2.) Select the correct statement regarding stall speeds.
questions.A_en: Power-off stalls occur at higher airspeeds with the gear and flaps down.
questions.B_en: In a 60° bank the airplane stalls at a lower airspeed with the gear up.
questions.C_en: Power-on stalls occur at lower airspeeds in shallower banks.

questions.question: (參考Fig2) 關於失速速度之敘述，下列何者為真
questions.A: 有動力及於60° 坡度轉彎的狀況下，飛機起落架及襟翼收起時之失速速度較起落架 及襟翼放下時之失速速度高10浬/小時
questions.B: 無動力的狀況下，於60° 坡度轉彎、襟翼及 起落架收起時之失速速度會較平飛、襟翼及起落架放下時之失速速度低35浬/小時
questions.C: 有動力的狀況下，飛機起落架及襟翼放下時，45° 坡度轉彎之失速速度較平飛時失速速 度高10浬/小時
questions.question_en: (Refer to Figure 2.) Select the correct statement regarding stall speeds. The airplane will stall
questions.A_en: 10 knots higher in a power-on 60° bank with gear and flaps up than with gear and flaps down.
questions.B_en: 35 knots lower in a power-off, flaps-up, 60° bank, than in a power-off, flaps-down, wings-level configuration.
questions.C_en: 10 knots higher in a 45° bank, power-on stall, with gear and flaps down, than in a wings-level stall.

questions.question: 於平飛轉彎時使用襟翼, 何者為真 ?
questions.A: 伸放襟翼, 會增加失速速度
questions.B: 收襟翼, 會增加失速速度
questions.C: 收襟翼, 需增加向前 的駕駛桿力
questions.question_en: Which is true regarding the use of flaps during level turns?
questions.A_en: The lowering of flaps increases the stall speed.
questions.B_en: The raising of flaps increases the stall speed.
questions.C_en: Raising flaps will require added forward pressure on the yoke or stick.

questions.question: 於進場及落地階段時,襟翼的主要功能之一是:
questions.A: 降低下降角度而不增加其空速
questions.B: 可以較低的空速提供相同的升力
questions.C: 減少升力, 可以採取比正常下降角度為陡的方式進場
questions.question_en: One of the main functions of flaps during the approach and landing is to
questions.A_en: decrease the angle of descent without increasing the airspeed.
questions.B_en: provide the same amount of lift at a slower airspeed.
questions.C_en: decrease lift, thus enabling a steeper-than-normal approach to be made.

questions.question: 飛機在同高度作協調轉彎時, 關於轉彎率及轉彎半徑何者為真 ?
questions.A: 對特定的坡度及空速而言, 其轉彎率及轉彎半徑不變
questions.B: 為保持穩定的轉彎率, 當 空速減小時必須增加坡度
questions.C: 真空速愈大, 轉彎率及轉彎半徑也愈大, 而與坡度無關
questions.question_en: Which is correct with respect to rate and radius of turn for an airplane flown in a coordinated turn at a constant altitude?
questions.A_en: For a specific angle of bank and airspeed, the rate and radius of turn will not vary.
questions.B_en: To maintain a steady rate of turn, the angle of bank must be increased as the airspeed is decreased.
questions.C_en: The faster the true airspeed, the faster the rate and larger the radius of turn regardless of the angle of bank.

questions.question: 轉彎時為保持高度, 為何需增加升降舵反壓 ? 這是為了補償
questions.A: 升力垂直分量的損失
questions.B: 升力水平分量的損失, 及增加離心力
questions.C: 方向舵偏轉及轉 彎時略微的反副翼
questions.question_en: Why is it necessary to increase back elevator pressure to maintain altitude during a turn? To compensate for the
questions.A_en: loss of the vertical component of lift.
questions.B_en: loss of the horizontal component of lift and the increase in centrifugal force.
questions.C_en: rudder deflection and slight opposite aileron throughout the turn.

questions.question: 為保持高度轉彎而提高攻角是補償何者減少
questions.A: 拉力相反方向的力
questions.B: 垂直方向的昇力
questions.C: 水平方向的昇力
questions.question_en: To maintain altitude during a turn, the angle of attack must be increased to compensate for the decrease in the
questions.A_en: forces opposing the resultant component of drag.
questions.B_en: vertical component of lift.
questions.C_en: horizontal component of lift.

questions.question: 失速速度受那些因素影響 ?
questions.A: 重量, 負荷因數及發動機動力
questions.B: 負荷因數, 攻角及發動機動力
questions.C: 攻角, 重量及 空氣密度
questions.question_en: Stall speed is affected by
questions.A_en: weight, load factor, and power.
questions.B_en: load factor, angle of attack, and power.
questions.C_en: angle of attack, weight, and air density.

questions.question: 相較於其它翼形, 平直翼的失速傾向發生在何處 ?
questions.A: 失速由翼尖向翼根延伸
questions.B: 失速由翼根向翼尖延伸
questions.C: 失速由翼後緣中間部位向翼 根及翼尖延伸
questions.question_en: A rectangular wing, as compared to other wing planforms, has a tendency to stall first at the
questions.A_en: wingtip, with the stall progression toward the wing root.
questions.B_en: wing root, with the stall progression toward the wing tip.
questions.C_en: center trailing edge, with the stall progression outward toward the wing root and tip.

questions.question: 藉著機翼攻角的改變, 駕駛員可控制飛機的
questions.A: 升力, 空速及阻力
questions.B: 升力, 空速及重心
questions.C: 升力及空速, 但不含阻力
questions.question_en: By changing the angle of attack of a wing, the pilot can control the airplane 
questions.A_en: lift, airspeed, and drag.
questions.B_en: lift, airspeed, and CG.
questions.C_en: lift and airspeed, but not drag.

questions.question: 機翼攻角直接控制著
questions.A: 機翼傾角
questions.B: 機翼上/下方氣流流量
questions.C: 作用於機翼的壓力分佈
questions.question_en: The angle of attack of a wing directly controls the
questions.A_en: angle of incidence of the wing.
questions.B_en: amount of airflow above and below the wing.
questions.C_en: distribution of pressures acting on the wing.

questions.question: 機翼在設計上會產生升力是由於
questions.A: 機翼的下方之負壓與機翼的上方之真空所產生的壓力差
questions.B: 機翼的下方的真空與機 翼上方之正壓所產生的壓力差
questions.C: 機翼下方的高壓和機翼上方的低壓所產生的壓力差 造成的
questions.question_en: An aircraft wing is designed to produce lift resulting from a difference in the
questions.A_en: negative air pressure below and a vacuum above the wing surface.
questions.B_en: vacuum below the wing surface and greater air pressure above the wing surface.
questions.C_en: higher air pressure below the wing surface and lower air pressure above the wing surface.

questions.question: 於機翼上與昇力垂直和阻力平行的為
questions.A: 翼弦
questions.B: 航跡
questions.C: 縱軸
questions.question_en: On a wing, the force of lift acts perpendicular to and the force of drag acts parallel to the
questions.A_en: chord line.
questions.B_en: flightpath.
questions.C_en: longitudinal axis.

questions.question: 飛機於穩定飛行狀態下何者為真
questions.A: 所有的力均相等
questions.B: 推力大於阻力，升力等於重力
questions.C: 推力大於阻力，升力大於重 力
questions.question_en: Which statement is true, regarding the opposing forces acting on an airplane in steady-state level flight?
questions.A_en: These forces are equal.
questions.B_en: Thrust is greater than drag and weight and lift are equal.
questions.C_en: Thrust is greater than drag and lift is greater than weight.

questions.question: 以小飛機而言, 正常螺旋改正會變得較困難, 如果
questions.A: 重心過度後移, 並繞著縱軸旋轉
questions.B: 重心過度後移, 並繞著重心旋轉
questions.C: 進入螺旋 是在完全失速之前
questions.question_en: In small airplanes, normal recovery from spins may become difficult if the
questions.A_en: CG is too far rearward and rotation is around the longitudinal axis.
questions.B_en: CG is too far rearward and rotation is around the CG.
questions.C_en: spin is entered before the stall is fully developed.

questions.question: 飛機於何種情形下作失速改正會較為困難 ?
questions.A: 重心後移
questions.B: 重心前移
questions.C: 升降舵配平向下調整
questions.question_en: Recovery from a stall in any airplane becomes more difficult when its
questions.A_en: center of gravity moves aft.
questions.B_en: center of gravity moves forward.
questions.C_en: elevator trim is adjusted nosedown.

questions.question: 如飛機載重接近於重心範圍的後部, 對於那個軸會傾向於不安定 ?
questions.A: 垂直軸
questions.B: 橫軸
questions.C: 縱軸
questions.question_en: If an airplane is loaded to the rear of its CG range, it will tend to be unstable about its
questions.A_en: vertical axis.
questions.B_en: lateral axis.
questions.C_en: longitudinal axis.

questions.question: 當飛機脫離地面效應時會
questions.A: 使地面摩擦減少, 而需要稍微減推力
questions.B: 使誘導阻力增加, 而需要更大的推力
questions.C: 需要較低的攻角, 以保持相同的升力係數
questions.question_en: An airplane leaving ground effect will
questions.A_en: experience a reduction in ground friction and require a slight power reduction.
questions.B_en: experience an increase in induced drag and require more thrust.
questions.C_en: require a lower angle of attack to maintain the same lift coefficient.

questions.question: 於平飛轉彎時加速, 必須採取什麼動作以保持高度 ? 攻角
questions.A: 及坡度必須減小

questions.A: 正確

questions.C: 對失速空速沒有任何影響。

questions.A_en: Correct
questions.B_en: incorrect

questions.question: 若飛機有四方型的機翼(rectangular wing)設計時，會先有翼尖失速(wing tips stall) 再進一步有翼根失速(wing roots stall)的情況
questions.A: 正確
questions.B: 不正確
questions.C: 在翼尖失速和翼根失速沒有任何先後差異。
questions.question_en: The rectangular wing has a tendency to stall first at the wing tips with the stall pattern progressing inward to the wing roots.
questions.A_en: Correct
questions.B_en: incorrect
questions.C_en: There is no difference between wing roots and wing tips during stall pattern.

questions.question: 飛行員藉由改變機翼攻角的大小，產生不同的升力、空速和飛機重心(CG)。
questions.A: 正確
questions.B: 不正確
questions.C: 攻角大小改變不會有任何影響。
questions.question_en: The pilot can control the airplane’s lift, airspeed, and CG by changing the angle of attack of a wing.
questions.A_en: Correct
questions.B_en: incorrect
questions.C_en: There is no change in airplane’s lift, airspeed, and CG

questions.question: 機翼的攻角是藉由改變
questions.A: 機翼的傾角
questions.B: 機翼上方和機翼下方的壓力差，而產生升力。

questions.question_en: The angel of attack of a wing directly controls the
questions.A_en: angle of incidence of the wing.
questions.B_en: distribution of pressures below and above wing.
questions.C_en: amount of airflow above and below the wing.

questions.question: 當霜(Frost)在機翼上方(Upper Surface of Wing)形成時
questions.A: 機翼的失速攻角角度會較平常大。
questions.B: 氣流會在低攻角時就產生氣流分流(Airflow Separation )，導致容易在起飛時的失速 (stall during Takeoff)
questions.C: 起飛時會產生 較大的阻力。
questions.question_en: Frost covering the upper surface of an airplane wing usually will cause
questions.A_en: the airplane to stall at an angle of attack that is higher than normal.
questions.B_en: airflow separation at a lower angel of attack, resulting in a tendency to stall during Takeoff
questions.C_en: drag factors so large that sufficient speed cannot be obtained for takeoff.

questions.question_en: There are no effect on the indicated stalling speed since
questions.A_en: Change in density altitude and angel of attack
questions.B_en: As the weight is increased
questions.C_en: A-?? As the bank angel increases

questions.question: 機翼的設計主要是藉由何種方式產生升力？
questions.A: 藉由在機翼下方產生負壓區及在機翼上方產生真空狀態，而產生升力。
questions.B: 藉由在 機翼下方產生高壓區及機翼上方產生低壓區。而產生升力。
questions.C: 機翼下方及機翼上方產 生高流量區。
questions.question_en: An aircraft wing is designed to produce lift resulting from a difference in the
questions.A_en: negative air pressure below and a vacuum above the wing’s surface.
questions.B_en: higher air pressure below the wing’s surface and lower air pressure above the wing’s surface.
questions.C_en: higher air flow above and below the wing’s surface .

questions.question: 當飛行在平穩空氣中，做水平協調轉彎時，機翼的負荷值( load factor )是
questions.A: 因為轉彎率而定
questions.B: 因為轉彎坡度而定
questions.C: 地速

questions.A_en: rate of turn
questions.B_en: angle of bank
questions.C_en: Ground speed

questions.question_en: If an aircraft with a gross weight of 1,500 pounds was subjected to a 60° constant-altitude bank, the total load would be
questions.A_en: 3,000 pounds
questions.B_en: 4,000 pounds.
questions.C_en: 12,000 pounds

questions.question: 在做坡度(Angle of Bank) 45°水平轉彎時，若指示空速由 110 knots 增加到 150 knots，此時負荷值( load factor)會有何改變？
questions.A: 負荷值增加，失速速度此時亦增加。

questions.C: 負荷值相同，但轉彎半(radius)徑則增加。

questions.A_en: increase as well as the stall speed.
questions.B_en: decrease and the stall speed will increase.
questions.C_en: remain the same but the radius turn will increase.

questions.A: 315磅，且可能會超過限制。

questions.C: 350磅，且不會超過 限制。
questions.question_en: Baggage weighing 70 pounds is placed in a normal category airplane’s baggage compartment which is placarded at 100 pounds. If this airplane is subjected to a positive load factor of 3.0G’s, the total load of the baggage would be
questions.A_en: 315 pounds and would be excessive.
questions.B_en: 210 pounds and would not be excessive.
questions.C_en: 350 pounds and would not be excessive.

questions.question: 在遭遇特殊天氣狀況時，操控飛機指示空速低於VA的原因是
questions.A: 高密度高度(High density altitude)的天氣會增加失速速度(stall speed)。

questions.A_en: High density altitude which increases the indicated stall speed
questions.B_en: Turbulence which causes an increase in stall speed
questions.C_en: Turbulence which causes a decrease in stall speed

questions.question: constant-speed propeller 的飛機主要的原理是
questions.A: 飛行員操控油門大小，槳葉變速器 ( prop governor )設定槳葉攻角角度(pitch angle of the propeller blades )不變。

questions.A_en: As throttle setting is changed by the pilot, the prop governor causes pitch angle of the propeller blades to remain unchanged
questions.B_en: A high blade angle, or increased pitch, reduces the propeller drag and allows more engine power for takeoffs.
questions.C_en: The propeller control regulates the engine RPM, and in turn, the propeller RPM.

questions.A_en: VS

questions.C_en: VSo.

questions.C_en: Stay well below its final approach flightpath and land at least 2,000 feet behind.

questions.question: 誰可以做最後決定是否接受 "land and hold short" (LAHSO)

questions.question: 當外界壓力降低時, 輸出推力
questions.A: 增加, 因噴射機於稀薄空氣中效率較佳
questions.B: 維持不變, 因受壓縮之進氣道空氣將補 償降低的大氣壓力
questions.C: 降低, 因高密度高度之故
questions.question_en: As outside air pressure decreases, thrust output will
questions.A_en: increase due to greater efficiency of jet aircraft in thin air
questions.B_en: remain the same since compression of inlet air will compensate for any decrease in air pressure
questions.C_en: decrease due to higher density altitude

questions.question: 落地時如發生水漂現象, 則減速之最佳方法為 ?
questions.A: 只能使用全(最大)主輪煞車
questions.B: 瞬間交互使用鼻輪及主輪煞車
questions.C: 使用氣動力煞車 達最大效益
questions.question_en: What is the best method of speed reduction if hydroplaning is experienced on landing ?
questions.A_en: apply full main wheel braking only
questions.B_en: apply nosewheel and main wheel braking alternately and abruptly
questions.C_en: apply aerodynamic braking to the fullest advantage

questions.question: 變更機翼的攻角，飛行員可以控制飛機的
questions.A: 昇力, 空速及阻力
questions.B: 昇力, 空速及重心
questions.C: 昇力及空速, 但不能控制阻力
questions.question_en: By changing the angle of attack of a wing, the pilot can control the airplane’s
questions.A_en: lift, airspeed, and drag.
questions.B_en: lift, airspeed, and CG.
questions.C_en: lift and airspeed, but not drag.

questions.question: 機翼的攻角直接控制
questions.A: 機翼的入射角
questions.B: 機翼上方及下方的氣流
questions.C: 作用在機翼上的壓力分佈
questions.question_en: The angle of attack of a wing directly controls the
questions.A_en: angle of incidence of the wing.
questions.B_en: amount of airflow above and below the wing.
questions.C_en: distribution of pressures acting on the wing.

questions.question: 有關一穩定平飛航機上的各作用力, 下列敘述何者為真,
questions.A: 各作用力大小相同
questions.B: 推力大於阻力, 重力等於昇力
questions.C: 推力大於阻力, 昇力大於 重力
questions.question_en: Which statement is true, regarding the opposing forces acting on an airplane in steady-state level flight?
questions.A_en: These forces are equal.
questions.B_en: Thrust is greater than drag and weight and lift are equal.
questions.C_en: Thrust is greater than drag and lift is greater than weight.

questions.question: 當飛行高度增加時, 如要產生相同的昇力, 則飛機需
questions.A: 無論攻角如何變化都保持相同的真空速飛行
questions.B: 以較低的真空速及較大的攻角飛行
questions.C: 無論攻角如何變化都以較高的真空速飛行
questions.question_en: To generate the same amount of lift as altitude is increased, an airplane must be flown at
questions.A_en: the same true airspeed regardless of angle of attack.
questions.B_en: a lower true airspeed and a greater angle of attack.
questions.C_en: a higher true airspeed for any given angle of attack.

questions.question: 當空速降低時,飛機之縱向控制必需作何者改變, 以維持相同高度
questions.A: 增加攻角, 以產生較大之昇力及阻力
questions.B: 增加攻角, 以補償減少的昇力
questions.C: 減小攻 角, 以補償增加的阻力
questions.question_en: What changes in airplane longitudinal control must be made to maintain altitude while the airspeed is being decreased?
questions.A_en: Increase the angle of attack to produce more lift than drag.
questions.B_en: Increase the angle of attack to compensate for the decreasing lift.
questions.C_en: Decrease the angle of attack to compensate for the increase drag.

questions.question: 理論上, 如果飛機平飛時的空速加倍. 則其寄生阻力會
questions.A: 變為兩倍
questions.B: 減為一半
questions.C: 變為四倍
questions.question_en: In theory, if the airspeed of an airplane is doubled while in level flight, parasite drag will become
questions.A_en: twice as great.
questions.B_en: half as great.
questions.C_en: four times greater.

questions.question: 如果飛機平飛時的空速減至低於最大昇阻比所對應的速度時，飛機的總阻力會
questions.A: 減小, 因為寄生阻力減少
questions.B: 增加, 因為誘導阻力增加
questions.C: 增加, 因為寄生阻力增 加
questions.question_en: As airspeed decreases in level flight below that speed for maximum lift/drag ratio, total drag of an airplane
questions.A_en: decreases because of lower parasite drag.
questions.B_en: increases because of increased induced drag.
questions.C_en: increases because of increased parasite drag.

questions.question: 當飛機從直線平飛改為爬昇時, 攻角需增加且升力會
questions.A: 暫時性減少
questions.B: 不變
questions.C: 暫時性增加
questions.question_en: During the transition from straight-and-level flight to a climb, the angle of attack is increased and lift
questions.A_en: is momentarily decreased.
questions.B_en: remains the same.
questions.C_en: is momentarily increased.

questions.question: 機翼上的昇力可以定義為
questions.A: 與相對風垂直的作用力
questions.B: 與翼弦垂直的壓力差
questions.C: 流經上翼面層流所造成且與機 翼弧面垂直的壓力差
questions.question_en: Lift on a wing is most properly defined as the
questions.A_en: force acting perpendicular to the relative wind.
questions.B_en: vary depending upon speed and air density.
questions.C_en: reduced pressure resulting from a laminar flow over the upper camber of an airfoil, which acts perpendicular to the mean camber.

questions.question: 飛機機翼之所以會產生昇力是因為下列何者之壓力差所造成
questions.A: 機翼下方之負壓及機翼上方之真空
questions.B: 機翼下方之真空及機翼上方之高壓
questions.C: 機翼 下方之高壓及機翼上方之低壓
questions.question_en: An aircraft wing is designed to produce lift resulting from a difference in the
questions.A_en: negative air pressure below and a vacuum above the wing’s surface.
questions.B_en: vacuum below the wing’s surface and greater air pressure above the wing’s surface.
questions.C_en: higher air pressure below the wing’s surface and lower air pressure above the wing’s surface.

questions.question: 對一穩定未加速飛機之昇力，下列敘述何者為真
questions.A: 較低速的飛機, 其攻角也必須減小, 以提供能維持高度之足夠昇力
questions.B: 任一攻角都 有一對應的指示空速, 以提供能維持高度之足夠昇力
questions.C: 一機翼在相同指示空速下始 終發生失速的狀況，因為重量增加時必須也增加速度, 以提供能維持高度之足夠昇力
questions.question_en: Which is true regarding the force of lift in steady, unaccelerated flight?
questions.A_en: At lower airspeeds the angle of attack must be less to generate sufficient lift to maintain altitude.
questions.B_en: There is a corresponding indicated airspeed required for every angle of attack to generate sufficient lift to maintain altitude.
questions.C_en: An airfoil will always stall at the same indicated airspeed; therefore, an increase in weight will require an increase in speed to generate sufficient lift to maintain altitude.

questions.question: 在機翼上，下列何者與昇力的方向垂直，而與阻力的方向平行?
questions.A: 弦線方向
questions.B: 飛行路徑
questions.C: 飛機縱軸
questions.question_en: On a wing, the force of lift acts perpendicular to and the force of drag acts parallel to the
questions.A_en: chord line.
questions.B_en: flightpath.
questions.C_en: longitudinal axis.

questions.question: 對一架以穩定狀態下降的飛機其所受之作用力, 下列敘述合者為真
questions.A: 上昇力小於下降力
questions.B: 向後力大於向前力
questions.C: 向前力等於向後力
questions.question_en: Which is true regarding the forces acting on an aircraft in a steady-state descent? The sum of all
questions.A_en: upward forces is less than the sum of all downward forces.
questions.B_en: rearward forces is greater than the sum of all forward forces.
questions.C_en: forward forces is equal to the sum of all rearward forces.

questions.question: 在維持最遠飛行距離的前提下, 當重量下降, 下列何者會隨之減小
questions.A: 高度
questions.B: 空速
questions.C: 攻角
questions.question_en: Which maximum range factor decreases as weight decreases?
questions.A_en: Altitude.
questions.B_en: Airspeed.
questions.C_en: Angle of attack.

questions.question: 下列何種情況會使小型飛機從旋轉中復原變得困難
questions.A: 重心太後方, 且旋轉以縱軸為中心
questions.B: 重心太後方, 且旋轉以重心為中心
questions.C: 在飛 機失速前就進入旋轉狀況
questions.question_en: in small airplanes, normal recovery from spins may become difficult if the
questions.A_en: CG is too far rearward and rotation is around the longitudinal axis.
questions.B_en: CG is too far rearward and rotation is around the CG.
questions.C_en: spin is entered before the stall is fully developed.

questions.question: 如果一架飛機之裝載重心偏後方, 則該飛機容易繞著下列何者產生不穩定現象
questions.A: 垂向軸線
questions.B: 橫向軸線
questions.C: 縱向軸線
questions.question_en: If an airplane is loaded to the rear of its CG range, it will tend to be unstable about its
questions.A_en: vertical axis.
questions.B_en: lateral axis.
questions.C_en: longitudinal axis.

questions.question: 飛機失速會發生在下列何者相同的狀況
questions.A: 攻角, 無論姿態與水平線的關係為何
questions.B: 空速, 無論姿態與水平線的關係為何
questions.C: 攻角及與水平線有關的姿態
questions.question_en: An airplane will stall at the same
questions.A_en: angle of attack regardless of the attitude with relation to the horizon.
questions.B_en: airspeed regardless of the attitude with relation to the horizon.
questions.C_en: angle of attack and attitude with relation to the horizon.

questions.question: 縱向穩定度與下列那一飛機操控有關
questions.A: 方向舵
questions.B: 昇降舵
questions.C: 副翼
questions.question_en: Longitudinal stability involves the motion of the airplane controlled by its ?
questions.A_en: rudder.
questions.B_en: elevator.
questions.C_en: ailerons.

questions.question: 將昇降舵控制桿往前扳了之後釋放, 如果飛機的姿態有回覆原點的傾向,則此飛機具有
questions.A: 正向的動態穩定度
questions.B: 正向的靜態穩定度
questions.C: 中性的動態穩定度
questions.question_en: If the airplane attitude initially tends to return to its original position after the elevator control is pressed forward and released, the airplane displays
questions.A_en: positive dynamic stability.
questions.B_en: positive static stability.
questions.C_en: Neutral dynamic stability.

questions.question: 如果昇降舵控制器往前壓而使飛機的姿態改變至一新的位置後放開, 若飛機之姿態不 再變化, 則此飛機具有
questions.A: 中性的縱向靜態穩定度
questions.B: 正向的縱向靜態穩定度
questions.C: 中性的縱向動態穩定度
questions.question_en: If the airplane attitude remains in a new position after the elevator control is pressed forward and released, the airplane displays
questions.A_en: neutral longitudinal static stability.
questions.B_en: positive longitudinal static stability.
questions.C_en: Neutral longitudinal dynamic stability.

questions.question: 飛機可以從下列何種現象看出具有縱向動態不穩定性
questions.A: 左右擺動幅度愈來愈大
questions.B: 前後擺動幅度愈來愈大
questions.C: 三軸旋轉擺動幅度愈來愈大
questions.question_en: Longitudinal dynamic instability in an airplane can be identified by
questions.A_en: bank oscillations becoming progressively steeper.
questions.B_en: pitch oscillations becoming progressively steeper.
questions.C_en: Trilatitudinal roll oscillations becoming progressively steeper.

questions.question: 當飛機進行一固定高度的協調轉彎時, 有關其轉彎率和轉彎半徑的敘述, 下列何者為正 確
questions.A: 對某一固定的傾角和速度, 轉彎率和轉彎半徑會維持不變
questions.B: 如要維持一固定的轉 彎率, 傾角必須隨速度之減少而增加
questions.C: 無論傾角為何, 轉彎率及轉彎半徑都會隨真空 速的增加而增加
questions.question_en: Which is correct with respect to rate and radius of turn for an airplane flown in a coordinated turn at a constant altitude?
questions.A_en: For a specific angle of bank and airspeed, the rate and radius of turn will not vary.
questions.B_en: To maintain a steady rate of turn, the angle of bank must be increased as the airspeed is decreased.
questions.C_en: The faster the true airspeed, the faster the rate and larger the radius of turn regardless of the angle of bank.

questions.question: 當轉彎時為何需要增加昇降舵的背壓以維持固定高度? 這是為了要補償
questions.A: 昇力的垂直分量減少
questions.B: 昇力的水平分量減少及為增加離心力
questions.C: 轉彎時舵面的偏 轉及副翼微量的反向作動
questions.question_en: Why is it necessary to increase back elevator pressure to maintain altitude during a turn? To compensate for the
questions.A_en: loss of the vertical component of lift.
questions.B_en: loss of the horizontal component of lift and the increase in centrifugal force.
questions.C_en: rudder deflection and slight opposite aileron throughout the turn.

questions.question: 轉彎時如要維持高度不變, 則攻角必須增加以補償下列何者的損失
questions.A: 與總阻力反向之力量
questions.B: 昇力的垂直分量
questions.C: 昇力的水平分量
questions.question_en: To maintain altitude during a turn, the angle of attack must be increased to compensate for the decrease in the
questions.A_en: forces opposing the resultant component of drag.
questions.B_en: vertical component of lift.
questions.C_en: horizontal component of lift.

questions.question: 轉彎中如果速度增加, 則必須採取何動作才能維持高度不變, 即攻角
questions.A: 及傾角必須減小
questions.B: 必須增加或傾角必須減小
questions.C: 必須減小或傾角必須增加
questions.question_en: If airspeed is increased during a level turn, what action would be necessary to maintain altitude? The angle of attack
questions.A_en: and angle of bank must be decreased.
questions.B_en: must be increased or angle of bank decreased.
questions.C_en: must be decreased or angle of bank increased.

questions.question: 任何飛機若維持一固定的傾角, 則作用在一諧調及等高度轉彎的負荷係數
questions.A: 為一固定值且其失速速度會隨傾角之增加而增加
questions.B: 會隨著轉彎率變化
questions.C: 為一固 定值且其失速速度會隨傾角之增加而減少
questions.question_en: For a give angle of bank, in any airplane, the load factor imposed in a coordinated constant-altitude turn
questions.A_en: is constant and the stall speed increases.
questions.B_en: varies with the rate of turn.
questions.C_en: is constant and the stall speed decreases.

questions.question: 在一固定高度的協調轉彎中, 機翼上的負荷大小取決於
questions.A: 轉彎率
questions.B: 傾角
questions.C: 真空速
questions.question_en: Airplane wing loading during a level coordinated turn in smooth air depends upon the
questions.A_en: rate of turn.
questions.B_en: angle of bank.
questions.C_en: true airspeed.

questions.question: 在一60度傾角的等高度轉彎中, 如果速度從90節增加到135節, 則負荷係數會
questions.A: 增加, 且失速速度也會增加
questions.B: 減少, 但失速速度會增加
questions.C: 不變, 但轉彎半徑會 增加
questions.question_en: If the airspeed is increased from 90 knots to 135 knots during a level 60° banked turn, the load factor will
questions.A_en: increase as well as the stall speed.
questions.B_en: decrease and the stall speed will increase.
questions.C_en: remain the same but the radius of turn will increase.

questions.question: (參考圖2) 有關失速速度,下列敘述何者為真?
questions.A: 如果起落架和襟翼都是放下的狀況, 無動力的飛機會比有動力的飛機有較高之失速 速度
questions.B: 在60度傾角時, 起落架收起時會比起落架放下時有較低的失速速度
questions.C: 有動 力的狀況下, 小傾斜角的飛機會比大傾斜角的飛機具有較低之失速速度
questions.question_en: (Refer to Figure 2.) Select the correct statement regarding stall speeds.
questions.A_en: Power-off stalls occur at higher airspeeds with the gear and flaps down.
questions.B_en: In a 60° bank the airplane stalls at a lower airspeed with the gear up.
questions.C_en: Power-on stalls occur at lower airspeeds in shallower banks.

questions.question: (參考圖2)有關失速速度,下列敘述何者為真?
questions.A: 一有動力且傾角為60度的飛機, 其起落架和襟翼都收起時之失速速度, 會較起落架 和襟翼都放下時之失速度高10節
questions.B: 一無動力, 襟翼收起且傾角為60度的飛機, 其失速 速度較一無動力, 襟翼放下且維持平飛者低25節
questions.C: 一45度傾角且有動力的飛機, 其失 速速度較一無傾角且襟翼放下者高10節
questions.question_en: (Refer to Figure2)Select the correct statement regarding stall speeds. The airplane will stall
questions.A_en: 10 knots higher in a power-on 60° bank with gear and flaps up than with gear and flaps down.
questions.B_en: 25 knots lower in a power-off, flaps-up, 60° bank, than in a power-off, flaps-down, wings-level configuration.
questions.C_en: 10 knots higher in a 45° bank, power-on stall than in a wings-level stall with flaps down.

questions.question: (參考圖4) 一無加速度的飛機, 如其失速速度為60節, 則如果該飛機遭遇2G的負荷係數 時, 其失速速度變為?
questions.question_en: (Refer to Figure 4.) What is the stall speed of an airplane under a load factor of 2 Gs if the unaccelerated stall speed is 60 knots?
questions.A_en: 66 knots.
questions.B_en: 74 knots.
questions.C_en: 84 knots.

questions.question: 在減少轉彎半徑的同時如要增加轉彎率, 則飛行員須
questions.A: 維持傾角不變且減低空速
questions.B: 增加傾角及空速
questions.C: 增加傾角但減低空速
questions.question_en: To increase the rate of turn and at the same time decrease the radius, a pilot should
questions.A_en: maintain the bank and decrease airspeed.
questions.B_en: increases the bank and increase airspeed.
questions.C_en: increase the bank and decrease airspeed.

questions.question: 當傾角增加時, 昇力之垂直分量會
questions.A: 減少且昇力之水平分量會增加
questions.B: 增加且昇力之水平分量會減少
questions.C: 減少且昇力之 水平分量會不變
questions.question_en: As the angle of bank is increased, the vertical component of lift
questions.A_en: decreases and the horizontal component of lift increase.
questions.B_en: increases and the horizontal component of lift decreases.
questions.C_en: decreases and the horizontal component of lift remains constant.

questions.question: 等高度轉彎時, 有關襟翼的使用, 下列敘述何者為真
questions.A: 放下襟翼會增加失速速度
questions.B: 收起襟翼會增加失速速度
questions.C: 收起襟翼時會需要增加 操縱桿向前的力量
questions.question_en: Which is true regarding the use of flaps during level turns?
questions.A_en: The lowering of flaps increases the stall speed.
questions.B_en: The raising of flaps increases the stall speed.
questions.C_en: Raising flaps will require added forward pressure on the yoke or stick.

questions.question: 機翼上的總空氣動力和飛機重量的比值稱為
questions.A: 負荷係數, 其直接影響失速速度
questions.B: 展弦比, 其直接影響失速速度
questions.C: 負荷係數, 其與失速速度無關
questions.question_en: The ratio between the total airload imposed on the wing and the gross weight of an aircraft in flight is known as?
questions.A_en: load factor and directly affects stall speed.
questions.B_en: aspect load and directly affects stall speed.
questions.C_en: load factor and has no relation with stall speed.

questions.question: 負荷係數為飛機翼面上的昇力
questions.A: 除以飛機的總重
questions.B: 乘以飛機的總重
questions.C: 除以飛機的基本空重
questions.question_en: Load factor is the lift generated by the wing of an aircraft at any given time
questions.A_en: divided by the total weight of the aircraft.
questions.B_en: multiplied by the total weight of the aircraft.
questions.C_en: divided by the basic empty weight of the aircraft.

questions.question: 飛機從一俯衝姿態急速回復平飛時, 負荷係數會導至失速速度
questions.A: 增加
questions.B: 減少
questions.C: 不變
questions.question_en: In a rapid recovery from a dive, the effects of load factor would cause the stall speed to
questions.A_en: increase.
questions.B_en: decrease.
questions.C_en: not vary.

questions.question: 如果飛機的重量為2,000磅, 則在一坡度為60度的等高度轉彎中, 飛機的總負荷為
questions.question_en: If an aircraft with gross weight of 2,000 pounds was subjected to a 60° constant-altitude bank, the total load would be
questions.A_en: 3,000 pounds.
questions.B_en: 4,000 pounds.
questions.C_en: 12,000 pounds.

questions.question: 當進行一固定傾角及高度之諧調轉彎時, 增加空速將會
questions.A: 使轉彎率變小並導致負荷因素降低
questions.B: 使轉彎率變小但不影響負荷因素
questions.C: 使轉彎 率變大但不影響負荷因素
questions.question_en: While maintaining a constant angle of bank and altitude in a coordinated turn, an increase in airspeed will
questions.A_en: decrease the rate of turn resulting in a decreased load factor.
questions.B_en: decrease the rate of turn resulting in no change in load factor.
questions.C_en: increase the rate of turn resulting in no change in load factor.

questions.question: 在一等高度轉彎中保持傾角不變, 則當轉彎率變化時, 負荷係數將
questions.A: 維持不變, 不受空氣密度及昇力方向之影響
questions.B: 與空氣密度及昇力方向之變化成正 比
questions.C: 與昇力方向之變化有關
questions.question_en: While holding the angle of bank constant in a level turn, if the rate of turn is varied the load factor would
questions.A_en: remain constant regardless of air density and the resultant life vector.
questions.B_en: vary depending upon speed and air density provided the resultant lift vector varies proportionately.
questions.C_en: vary depending upon the resultant lift vector.

questions.question: (參考圖4) 當坡度從60度增加到80度時, 負荷係數會增加
questions.A: 3 Gs
questions.B: 3.5 Gs
questions.C: 3.7 Gs
questions.question_en: (Refer to Figure 4.) What increase in load factor would take place if the angle of bank were increased from 60° to 80°?
questions.A_en: 3 Gs.
questions.C_en: 3.7 Gs

questions.question: 失速速度會受下列何者影響
questions.A: 重量, 負荷係數及動力
questions.B: 負荷係數, 攻角及動力
questions.C: 攻角, 重量及空氣密度
questions.question_en: Stall speed is affected by
questions.A_en: weight, load factor, and power.
questions.B_en: load factor, angle of attack, and power.
questions.C_en: angle of attack, weight, and air density.

questions.question: 飛機的失速速度大部份受何影響?
questions.A: 空氣密度的改變
questions.B: 飛行高度的變化
questions.C: 飛機負荷的改變
questions.question_en: The stalling speed of an airplane is most affected by
questions.A_en: changes in air density.
questions.B_en: variations in flight altitude.
questions.C_en: variations in airplane loading

questions.question: 在下列何種狀況下會使任一飛機從失速中復原變得困難
questions.A: 重心向後移動
questions.B: 重心向前移動
questions.C: 昇降舵調整片調至機鼻朝下
questions.question_en: Recovery from a stall in any airplane becomes more difficult when its
questions.A_en: center of gravity moves aft.
questions.B_en: center of gravity moves forward.
questions.C_en: elevator trim is adjusted nose down.

questions.question: 下列何種天氣現象會需要將飛機之速度減至VA以下
questions.A: 較高的密度高, 其將導致指示失速速度增加
questions.B: 亂流, 其將導致失速速度增加
questions.C: 亂流, 其將導致失速速度降低
questions.question_en: The need to slow an aircraft below VA is brought about by the following weather phenomenon:
questions.A_en: High density altitude which increases the indicated stall speed.
questions.B_en: Turbulence which causes an increase in stall speed.
questions.C_en: Turbulence which causes a decrease in stall speed.

questions.question: 機翼發生失速時之攻角會維持不變, 其與
questions.A: 重量, 動壓, 傾角或俯仰姿態無關
questions.B: 動壓無關, 但會隨重量, 傾角及俯仰姿態之 變化而變化
questions.C: 重量及俯仰姿態無關, 但會隨動壓及傾角之變化而變化
questions.question_en: The angle of attack at which a wing stalls remains constant regardless of
questions.A_en: weight, dynamic pressure, bank angle, or pitch attitude.
questions.B_en: dynamic pressure but varies with weight, bank angle, and pitch attitude.
questions.C_en: weight and pitch attitude, but varies with dynamic pressure and bank angle.

questions.question: 襟翼在飛機進場落地時的主要功能是
questions.A: 在不需增加速度的狀況下減少下降角
questions.B: 在較低的速度下維持一樣的昇力
questions.C: 減少 昇力, 以便飛機能以較陡之角度進場
questions.question_en: One of the main functions of flaps during the approach and landing is to
questions.A_en: decrease the angle of descent without increasing the airspeed.
questions.B_en: provide the same amount of lift at a slower airspeed.
questions.C_en: decrease lift, thus enabling a steeper-than-normal approach to be made.

questions.question: 下列何種裝置伸展後會使昇力及阻力都增加
questions.A: 襟翼
questions.B: 減速板
questions.C: 前襟翼
questions.question_en: Both lift and drag would be increased when which of these devices are extended?
questions.A_en: Flaps.
questions.B_en: Spoilers.
questions.C_en: Slats.

questions.question: 長方形的翼面和其他形狀之翼面相較, 其失速會最先發生在
questions.A: 翼尖, 然後朝翼根擴散
questions.B: 翼根, 然後朝翼尖擴散
questions.C: 機翼尾緣中央, 然後分朝翼 根及翼尖擴散
questions.question_en: A rectangular wing, as compared to other wing planforms, has a tendency to stall first at the
questions.A_en: wingtip, with the stall progression toward the wing root.
questions.B_en: wing root, with the stall progression toward the wing tip.
questions.C_en: center trailing edge, with the stall progression outward toward the wing root and tip.

questions.question: 從螺槳後方看螺槳以順時針方向旋轉, 其所產生漩渦狀的氣流, 如果從力矩的效應來看 會使飛機
questions.A: 繞垂直軸向右轉, 及繞縱軸左轉
questions.B: 繞垂直軸向左轉, 及繞縱軸右轉
questions.C: 繞垂直軸 向左轉, 及繞縱軸左轉
questions.question_en: A propeller rotating clockwise as seen from the rear, creates a spiraling slipstream. The spiraling slipstream, along with torque effect, tends to rotate the airplane to the
questions.A_en: right around the vertical axis, and to the left around the longitudinal axis.
questions.B_en: left around the vertical axis, and to the right around the longitudinal axis.
questions.C_en: Left around the vertical axis, and to the left around the longitudinal axis.

questions.question: 飛機離開地面效應區時會
questions.A: 遭遇地面摩擦力增加的狀況, 因此需要增加一些動力
questions.B: 遭遇誘導阻力增加的狀況 因此需要增加一些推力
questions.C: 需要降低攻角以維持相同的昇力係數
questions.question_en: An airplane leaving ground effect will
questions.A_en: experience a reduction in ground friction and require a slight power reduction.
questions.B_en: experience an increase in induced drag and require more thrust.
questions.C_en: require a lower angle of attack to maintain the same lift coefficient.

questions.question: 在有地面效應和沒有地面效應的的比較下, 如要產生相同的昇力, 則飛機須
questions.A: 維持較小之攻角
questions.B: 維持相同之攻角
questions.C: 維持較大之攻角
questions.question_en: To produce the same lift while in ground effect as when out of ground effect, the airplane requires
questions.A_en: a lower angle of attack.
questions.B_en: the same angle of attack.
questions.C_en: a greater angle of attack.

questions.question: 在有地面效應和沒有地面效應的的比較下, 如維持攻角不變, 則昇力會
questions.A: 增加, 且誘導阻力將減少
questions.B: 減少, 且誘導阻力將增加
questions.C: 增加, 且誘導阻力也將 增加
questions.question_en: If the same angle of attack is maintained in maintained in ground effect as when out of ground effect, lift will
questions.A_en: increase, and induced drag will decrease.
questions.B_en: decrease, and parasite drag will increases.
questions.C_en: increase, and induced drag will increase.

questions.question: 有關尾流之敘述, 下列敘述何者為真
questions.A: 指飛機起飛抬頭時會產生之渦流
questions.B: 其主要的危害是會讓飛機產生誘導滾動而失控
questions.C: 當飛機較重,較乾淨及較快的情況下, 會產生較大的渦流
questions.question_en: Choose the correct statement regarding wake turbulence. .
questions.A_en: Vortex generation begins with the initiation of the takeoff roll.
questions.B_en: The primary hazard is loss of control because of induced roll.
questions.C_en: The greatest vortex strength is produced when the generating airplane is heavy, clean, and fast.

questions.question: 在大型噴射機離場後接著起飛, 飛行員可藉由下列合種方式降低翼尖渦流之危害
questions.A: 在到達大型噴射機之飛行路徑前, 儘速轉彎以脫離其尾流
questions.B: 在起飛及爬昇時增加 額外的速度
questions.C: 延長起飛滾行的距離直到超過大型噴射機起飛抬頭位置之後
questions.question_en: During a takeoff made behind a departing large jet airplane, the pilot can minimize the hazard of wingtip vortices by
questions.A_en: being airborne prior to reaching the jet’s flight path until able to turn clear of its wake.
questions.B_en: maintaining extra speed on takeoff and climb out.
questions.C_en: extending the takeoff roll and not rotating until well beyond the jet’s rotation point.

questions.question: 如果一架大型噴射機在前方一哩的位置由左至右穿越你的飛行路徑, 你會採取何種程 序以避免進入其紊亂的尾流區中
questions.A: 將飛行路徑稍微向上調整, 確保在噴射客機之上即可
questions.B: 減速至VA , 然後保持高度 及航向
questions.C: 將飛行路徑稍微向下調整, 確保在噴射客機和航向垂直即可
questions.question_en: Which procedure should you follow to avoid wake turbulence if a large jet crosses your course from left to right approximately 1 mile ahead and at your altitude?
questions.A_en: Make sure you are slightly above the path of the jet.
questions.B_en: Slow your airspeed to VA and maintain altitude and course.
questions.C_en: Make sure you are slightly below the path of the jet and perpendicular to the course.

questions.question: 如果一架大型噴射機在你起飛前降落, 你會在跑道何處離地, 以避免進入其紊亂的尾流 區中
questions.A: 在大型噴射機著地點之後
questions.B: 在大型噴射機著地點之前
questions.C: 在大型噴射機著地點之 前500呎
questions.question_en: To avoid possible wake turbulence from a large jet aircraft that has just landed prior to your takeoff, at which point on the runway should you plan to become airborne?
questions.A_en: Past the point where the jet touched down.
questions.B_en: At the point where the jet touched down, or just prior to this point.
questions.C_en: Approximately 500 feet prior to the point where the jet touched down.

questions.question: 在一大型航機之後降落, 應採取何種程序以避免進入其紊亂的尾流區中
questions.A: 始終保持在大型機最後進場路徑之上, 直到飛機著地
questions.B: 始終保持在大型機最後進 場路徑之下, 直到飛機著地
questions.C: 始終保持在大型機最後進場路徑之下, 並與大型機相隔 至少2,000呎
questions.question_en: When landing behind a large aircraft, which procedure should be followed for vortex avoidance?
questions.A_en: Stay above its final approach flight path all the way to touchdown.
questions.B_en: Stay below and to one side of its final approach flight path.
questions.C_en: Stay well below its final approach flight path and land at least 2,000 feet behind.

questions.question: 滑翔機由昇力而產生之阻力稱為
questions.A: 誘導阻力, 其與空速大小無關
questions.B: 誘導阻力, 其與空速大小有關
questions.C: 寄生阻力, 其 與空速大小有關
questions.question_en: That portion of the glider’s total drag created by the production of lift is called.
questions.A_en: induced drag, and is not affected by changes in airspeed.
questions.B_en: induced drag, and is greatly affected by changes in airspeed.
questions.C_en: parasite drag, and is greatly affected by changes in airspeed.

questions.question: 滑翔機最佳昇阻比是發生於寄生阻力
questions.A: 等於誘導阻力時
questions.B: 小於誘導阻力時
questions.C: 大於誘導阻力時
questions.question_en: The best L/D ratio of a glider occurs when parasite drag is
questions.A_en: equal to induced drag.
questions.B_en: less than induced drag.
questions.C_en: greater than induced drag.

questions.question: 在某一固定空速下,空氣密度增加會對滑翔機之昇力和阻力造成何種影響
questions.A: 昇力和阻力都減少
questions.B: 昇力增加, 但阻力減少
questions.C: 昇力和阻力都增加
questions.question_en: At a give airspeed, what effect will an increase in air density have on lift and drag of a glider?
questions.A_en: Lift and drag will decrease.
questions.B_en: Lift will increase but drag will decrease.
questions.C_en: Lift and drag will increase.

questions.question: 如果滑翔機之空速由每小時45哩增至每小時90哩, 則寄生阻力會
questions.A: 增加2倍
questions.B: 增加4倍
questions.C: 增加6倍
questions.question_en: If the airspeed of a glider is increased from 45 MPH to 90 MPH, the parasite drag will be?
questions.A_en: two times greater.
questions.B_en: four times greater.
questions.C_en: six times greater.

questions.question: 如果滑翔機之指示空速由每小時90哩減至每小時45哩, 則誘導阻力會
questions.A: 減少4倍
questions.B: 增加2倍
questions.C: 增加4倍
questions.question_en: If the indicated airspeed of a glider is decreased from 90 MPH to 45 MPH, the induced drag will be
questions.A_en: four times less.
questions.B_en: two times greater.
questions.C_en: four times greater.

questions.question: (參考圖5) 從C點到E點的水平虛線代表
questions.A: 無限的負荷係數
questions.B: 負荷係數的上限
questions.C: 正常操作之空速範圍
questions.question_en: (Refer to Figure 5.) The horizontal dashed line from point C to point E represents the
questions.A_en: ultimate load factor.
questions.B_en: positive limit load factor.
questions.C_en: airspeed range for normal operations.

questions.question: 理論上, 如攻角及其他因素不變, 空速加倍, 則高空速的昇力
questions.A: 和低空速之昇力相同
questions.B: 為低空速之昇力之一倍
questions.C: 為低空速之昇力之四倍
questions.question_en: In theory, if the angle of attack and other factors remain constant and the airspeed is double, the lift produced at the higher speed will be
questions.A_en: the same as at the lower speed.
questions.B_en: two times greater than at the lower speed.
questions.C_en: four times greater than at the lower speed.
